reason: The statement does apply to the text fragment. In this passage, the children of Israel were forced to leave their homes in Egypt because of the plagues that were inflicted upon the Egyptians as a result of their sin against Yahweh. Pharaoh eventually commanded Moses and Aaron to take the Israelites and leave, as they had sinned against Yahweh by not letting His people go. The Israelites were indeed forced to leave their homes and go somewhere else due to the sin of the Egyptians against Yahweh.
